ddl: ALTER TABLE audit_logs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS payload_hash text; ALTER TABLE audit_logs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS chain_hash text; ALTER TABLE audit_logs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS event_type text; ALTER TABLE audit_logs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS actor_id text; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_checkpoints (id text PRIMARY KEY, checkpoint_date text NOT NULL, merkle_root text NOT NULL, tsr_token text, event_count integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, created_at timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT now());
